policies.title: Travel Protocall
policies.content:
Code of Conduct: Standards for professional behavior and ethics.
Attendance & Leave Policy: Rules for working hours, holidays, and leave.
Dress Code Policy: Guidelines for appropriate workplace attire.
Work From Home / Remote Work Policy: Expectations for remote employees.
IT & Data Security Policy: Proper use of company devices, email, and protection of confidential information.
Anti-Harassment & Equal Opportunity Policy: Ensures a respectful and inclusive workplace free from discrimination.
Health & Safety Policy: Procedures to maintain a safe working environment.
Performance & Disciplinary Policy: Expectations for performance and consequences of misconduct.
Confidentiality Policy: Protects company and customer information.
Expense & Travel Policy: Rules for business travel and expense reimbursements.

policies.title: Office Protocall
policies.content:
Policy Details and rules are as follows 
1. Everyone should weard their id card in office.

policies.title: Code of Conduct & Ethics
policies.content: SnailHR and our NBFC parent organisation are committed to maintaining strict professional ethics, workplace integrity, and regulatory compliance. Employees must uphold confidentiality, prevent conflicts of interest, and treat clients and team members with respect.

policies.title: Annual Leave & Attendance Policy
policies.content: Every active employee receives annual leave allowances including Casual Leave, Medical Leave, and Earned Leave. Daily attendance punches must be logged via SnailHR. Leaves must be applied in advance and approved by HR or reporting managers.

policies.title: Data Protection & Information Security
policies.content: NBFC employees handle sensitive customer financial and personal information (PII). All company devices must be secured with multi-factor authentication and passwords. Sharing customer credit info externally without authorization is strictly prohibited.

policies.title: Sales Commission & Agent Incentives Framework
policies.content: Relationship managers and field sales agents earn monthly incentive commissions based on verified loan disbursements and loan portfolio performance. All deal documentations must pass audit before commission release.

simulatedEmails.subject: Payslip Generated for July 2026 - SnailHR Admin
simulatedEmails.body:
Dear Amit Sharma,

Your salary payslip for the month of July 2026 has been successfully compiled and processed by the SnailHR automation pipeline.

Summary of Earnings & Deductions:
------------------------------------------------
- Basic Salary: Rs. 85,000
- HRA: Rs. 34,000
- Special Allowances: Rs. 21,000
- PF Deduction: Rs. 6,500
- Corporate Fines Deducted: Rs. 0
- Tax Deduction (TDS/PT): Rs. 7,000
------------------------------------------------
- Net Disbursed Pay: Rs. 1,26,500
------------------------------------------------

Your salary will be disbursed directly to your registered bank account (HDFC Bank, A/C: ****1098) within the next 48 hours.

You can access your SnailHR dashboard to download a detailed tabular break-up.

Warm Regards,
SnailHR Payroll Automation Portal
